calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion To Reopen Case
Off Calendar May-23-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: David Marcolini, Esq., 415.568.0742, for Plaintiff Unifund CCR Partners; No other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF UNIFUND CCR PARTNERS' Motion To Reopen Case is granted. No opposition filed. Order signed in open court. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Paula Shi #13358.

Notice Of Motion To Reopen Case
Off Calendar Apr-23-2014 Continued To May-23-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance. The Court adopted its tentative ruling which was not contested.
PLAINTIFF UNIFUND CCR PARTNERS' Motion To Reopen Case is continued to May 23, 2014 to give Unifund CCR Partners the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Unifund CCR Partners must deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than April 23, 2014 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be denied. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). Judge: A. James Robertson; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR# 5976.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-05-2013 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance nor objection. Court ordered case dismissed. Judge Cynthia M. Lee; Clerk KCox; Proceedings not reported. (610)

MINI MINUTES: Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq. appearing specially for Plaintiff. The Order to Show Cause is re-set Dec-03-2013 at 10:30 AM in Dept. 610. Proceedings not reported. (610)

MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $500.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to JUN-18-2013 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. Proceedings not reported. (610)

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Judgment On The Pleadings; Memo Of P&A, Ntc Of Request For Judicial Ntc
Off Calendar Nov-02-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Shirley Xhao, defendant appearing on her own behalf;
No other appearance.

RULING: The matter was not argued. The court modified its tentative ruling, which was issued in error, as follows: PLAINTIFF UNIFUND CCR PARTNERS' Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings is granted with 20 days leave to amend because no opposition was filed. The defendant has 20 days to amend the answer. (Moving party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Ernest Goldsmith; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not Reported.
